title: Beta Patch Notes - v0.107.0
author: demileaf
contents:
Another bi-weekly beta patch is here! This one is a bit smaller as it is intended to lay the groundwork for moving the beta branch to the main branch. Therefore, these updates are mostly focused on stability: a lot of bug fixes, UI/UX/QOL additions, and performance improvements along with just a few balance changes and art additions....

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44971832/96250518646cf2f0fecc834de558fd06e1f23d56.gif[/img]

...Like this new Defect animation!

Without further ado, let's dive in...

[h3]CONTENT & BALANCE:[/h3]

[b]Enemies:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Skulking Colony[/b]: now gets +1 Strength on its Strength gain turn on high Ascension
[*]Changed [b]Aeonglass[/b]:
[list]
[*]No longer applies the Ebb debuff
[*]Now gains Block on its Ebb move (single hit) instead of its Increasing Intensity move
[/list][/list]
[b]Potions & Relics:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]The Boot[/b] relic: damage increase now also applies to Osty's attacks
[/list]
[b]Ironclad:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Juggernaut[/b] card: damage increased from 5(7) -> 6(8)
[/list]
[b]Regent:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Monarch's Gaze[/b] card: Energy cost decreased from 3(2) -> 2(1)
[*]Nerfed [b]Reflect[/b] card: Block gain decreased from 16(20) -> 15(20)
[/list]
[b]Necrobinder:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Sic 'Em[/b] card: Summon increased from 2(3) -> 3(4)
[*]Buffed [b]The Scythe[/b] card: damage increased from 3(4) -> 4(5)
[/list]

[h3]QUALITY OF LIFE:[/h3]
[list]
[*]During the Gremlin Merc fight, if Gremlin Merc didn't steal any gold but Fat Gremlin escaped, the player now receives 50% of the normal gold reward instead of 0%
[/list]

[h3]USER INTERFACE & EXPERIENCE:[/h3]

[b]General:[/b]
[list]
[*]If errors occur on run start, a popup is now displayed instead of a black screen
[*]Implemented preferred Ascension for random character option
[/list]

[b]Ancients:[/b]
[list]
[*]When [b]Vakuu[/b] tells you how many times you've visited him, the number he says is now accurate
[*][b]Pael's Flesh[/b] relic now visually increases the maximum energy amount shown in your Energy counter
[list]
[*]For example, if you have 3 max energy before Pael's Flesh triggers, your energy counter will show 4/4 instead of 4/3 after Pael's Flesh triggers
[/list][/list]
[b]Enemies:[/b]
[list]
[*]The [b]Wither[/b] status card preview upgrade level now matches the upgrade level that [b]Aeonglass[/b] is actually on
[/list]
[b]Necrobinder:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Sacrifice[/b] card now previews how much Block it will gain, so that it's easier to plan with effects like Dexterity and Frail
[/list]
[h3]ART:[/h3]
[list]
[*]Added Epoch art for:
[list]
[*]Devastation
[*]The 12
[*]The Giant
[/list]
[*]Added [b]Defect[/b] power up animation
[*]Added new [b]Soul Nexus[/b] VFX
[/list]
[h3]WRITING:[/h3]
[list]
[*]Updated translations for various languages
[/list]
[h3]BUG FIXES:[/h3]

[b]General:[/b]
[list]
[*]If you have Steam Cloud turned off, cloud files no longer overwrite local ones
[*]First floor of Act 2 can no longer be a ? room instead of a fight when carrying [b]Spoils Map[/b] quest card
[*]Fixed card Energy cost sometimes showing the wrong value when its cost is randomized
[*]Fixed cards returning to the wrong spot in your hand after deselecting them during a card selection
[*]Card draw is now stopped after combat ends during the draw phase
[*]Overgrowth act now plays both of its music tracks instead of always the same one
[*]Music no longer restarts twice at the start of a run
[/list]
[b]Ancient:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed an issue where, if the player has [b]Vakuu's Whispering Earring[/b] relic and it auto-plays [b]Void Form[/b] card, it could sometimes continue auto-playing cards on the player's next turn
[*]Fixed [b]Nonupeipe's Diamond Diadem[/b] relic resetting its count after [b]Hellraiser[/b] power plays cards at the start of the turn
[/list]
[b]Enemies:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Aeonglass's Wither[/b] status card no longer briefly returns to your hand before you discard your hand at the end of your turn
[*]Can no longer upgrade [b]Wither[/b] status card with [b]Armaments[/b] or [b]Drain Life[/b] cards
[*]Fixed an issue where, after killing Spectral Knight, cards that would normally be Ethereal could sometimes become non-Ethereal
[*]Fixed creature and boss VFX occasionally failing to appear
[*]Fixed [b]Flyconid[/b] spore effect lingering when its attack is interrupted
[*]Fixed [b]Fossil Stalker[/b] VFX continuously playing in the Bestiary
[*]Fixed the [b]Living Fog[/b] encounter name in the death quote
[*]If you kill [b]Gremlin Merc[/b] before he steals any gold from you, the rewards screen no longer says "Mugged..." even if Fat Gremlin escapes
[/list]
[b]Potions & Relics:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed an issue where, if the player hatched [b]Byrdonis Egg[/b] at a rest site while the rest of their deck was upgraded and they had [b]Miniature Tent[/b] relic, they were unable to upgrade the newly-added [b]Byrd Swoop[/b] card until the next rest site
[*]Fixed an issue where, if [b]Pantograph[/b] relic healed the player above 50% health, [b]Red Skull[/b] relic's Strength increase would still apply until an attack was played
[*][b]Snecko Skull[/b] relic now always triggers before [b]Unsettling Lamp[/b] relic
[*]Fixed visual errors with the outline of some potion assets
[/list]
[b]Events:[/b]
[list]
[*][b]Gnarled Hammer[/b] relic can no longer be traded at the [b]Relic Trader[/b] event
[*]Fixed [b]Perfect Fit[/b] enchantment not working correctly if you play [b]Reboot[/b] card while the enchanted card is in your hand or draw pile
[*]Fixed [b]War Historian Repy[/b] event not removing all duplicates of [b]Lantern Key[/b] card if you have more than 2
[/list]
[b]Silent:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed an issue where, if the player had [b]Unceasing Top[/b] relic, played [b]Hidden Daggers[/b] card, and discarded a Sly card, Unceasing Top could cause the player to incorrectly draw a card before the Shivs were added to their hand
[/list]
[b]Necrobinder:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed an issue where, if the player played [b]Lethality[/b] card and the first attack of the turn had Replay, the replayed attack would incorrectly display Lethality's buffed damage amount before correctly dealing its base damage amount
[/list]
[b]Multiplayer:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed crash when using potions in multiplayer due to state divergence
[*]Fixed rare issue which caused incorrect cards to be shown when obtaining cards at certain events
[*][b]Nightmare[/b] card VFX no longer plays for all players
[/list]
[h3]PERFORMANCE:[/h3]
[list]
[*]Reduced stuttering when combat effects appear for the first time in a run
[/list]
[h3]MODDING:[/h3]
[list]
[*]Base game no longer deletes progress from mods that are removed or errored
[/list]
